description_long: This sconce features a robust, industrial design with a circular, metallic main body and two cylindrical lamp housings extending outward at an angle. The metal surface has a weathered, bronze-like finish, giving it a vintage, utilitarian appearance. Each lamp housing is capped with a frosted or opaque lens, likely to diffuse the light and reduce glare. The fixture is constructed with visible bolts and seams, emphasizing its mechanical, functional aesthetic. The overall form is symmetrical, with the two lamps positioned equidistantly from the central body. The sconce is designed to be mounted on a wall, providing directional lighting suitable for urban exteriors or industrial-themed interiors.
description: A vintage industrial-style wall sconce with a round metal body and two outward-facing cylindrical lamp housings capped with frosted lenses.
description_view_0: The sconce is seen at an angle, showing the round central body and both cylindrical lamp housings, with the left lamp more prominent.
description_view_1: A direct front view highlights the symmetry of the fixture, with both lamp housings equally visible and the round body centered.
description_view_2: The sconce is viewed from the opposite angle of view 0, making the right lamp housing more prominent while still showing the round body.
description_view_3: A slightly offset front view, showing both lamp housings and the round body, with a clear view of the fixture's symmetry.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has an industrial, vintage style with a utilitarian, mechanical look. Its weathered metal finish and exposed bolts evoke early 20th-century factory lighting.
